input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the package is complete for this COU, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act on an alarming-looking but adequately-addressed signal. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: An OOD detector flags the point; direct validation evidence at the point exists.

case_context.cou: the evaluation point informs an aerodynamic decision

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The OOD detector is a feature-space heuristic; direct experimental validation at the exact COU point (2% error) is stronger, point-specific evidence of applicability that overrides the distributional novelty score.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.justification: direct experimental validation at the exact point (2%) overrides a feature-space OOD heuristic

forbidden_claims: restricts/rejects on the OOD flag while ignoring direct validation at the point (over-action)
asserts the prediction is credible in general (a verdict beyond the point evidence)

hardness.obvious_signal: an out-of-distribution detector flags the evaluation point as novel
hardness.conflicting_signal: the OOD flag is a feature-space heuristic, but there is DIRECT experimental validation at this exact operating point (2% error) — direct evidence at the point overrides a distributional novelty score

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 applicability: direct validation at the evaluation point is stronger evidence than a distributional OOD heuristic; over-acting on the flag despite point evidence is over-action.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
